Class ApiClient

java.lang.Object
com.carbonell.melody.seer.component.api.ApiClient
public class ApiClient extends Object
This class interacts with the API
Author:
marta

  • Constructor Details

    • ApiClient

      public ApiClient(String baseUrl)

  • Method Details

    • login

      public String login(String email, String password) throws Exception
      Method to authenticate a user. Sends a POST request with the credentials. Then, if authentication is successful, a token is obtained and saved.
      Parameters:
      email -
      password -
      Returns:
      the token
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails

    • getMe

      public Usuari getMe(String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to get the information of a certain user
      Parameters:
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      a Usuari object
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getNickName

      public String getNickName(int id, String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to retreive the nickname of a certain user from a given id
      Parameters:
      id - of the user
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      a String of the username
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request is not valid

    • getAllMedia

      public List<Media> getAllMedia(String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to get all the media available on the API
      Parameters:
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      a list of Media objects
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails

    • getMediaByUser

      public List<Media> getMediaByUser(int userId, String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to get all media uploaded by a given user (by ID)
      Parameters:
      userId -
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      a list of Media objects
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails

    • getMyMedia

      public List<Media> getMyMedia(String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to get media uploaded by the user making the request
      Parameters:
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      a list of Media objects
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails

    • listBlobs

      public String listBlobs(String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to get blobs from a certain container
      Parameters:
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      a Json with the requested info
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails

    • download

      public void download(int id, File destFile, String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to download a certain file by its ID, and downloaded to a certain file.
      Parameters:
      id - of the media
      destFile - of the file
      jwt - token
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails

    • uploadFileMultipart

      public String uploadFileMultipart(File file, String downloadedFromUrl, String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to upload files as a multipart/form-data Uploads the file, the url from where it was originally downloaded and a container
      Parameters:
      file - to upload
      downloadedFromUrl - original url
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      the server response
      Throws:
      Exception - if the upload fails

    • getMediaAddedSince

      public List<Media> getMediaAddedSince(OffsetDateTime from, String jwt) throws Exception
      Method to get media added since a given point of time (using OffsetDateTime)
      Parameters:
      from - date-time
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      list of Media objects
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails

    • getMediaAddedSince

      public List<Media> getMediaAddedSince(String isoFrom, String jwt) throws Exception
      Overload of getMediaAddedSince(). Accepts ISO-8601 string instead of OffsetDateTime
      Parameters:
      isoFrom - date
      jwt - token
      Returns:
      list of Media Objects
      Throws:
      Exception - if the request fails
